name: portfo
description: A professional stock portfolio tracker with real-time price updates and authentication

scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$repo=(Get-Location).Path; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -and $_.CommandLine -match 'next dev' -and $_.CommandLine -match [regex]::Escape($repo) } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; if (Test-Path .next/dev/lock) { Remove-Item .next/dev/lock -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; next dev"

author: Antony
